title: Improve memory continuity for 'unknown'
description: 'context_loss' causes 50% failure rate in 'unknown' tasks. Tiered memory or session hydration improvements needed.

implementation.changes:
1. For context_loss: add critical unknown context to HEARTBEAT.md pre-fetch
2. For memory_miss: improve tiered-memory tagging for unknown
3. For compaction_lost_context: add WAL entry for unknown state
4. Run: uv run python skills/tiered-memory/scripts/memory_cli.py store

expected_improvement: Restore continuity for unknown tasks across session resets
